pom.xml.general_idea: Update the target Java version property from 11 to 17 to align with the migration goal.
Upgrade Spring Boot starter parent from 2.4.3 to 2.6.2 to support Java 17 and newer dependencies.

src/main/resources/application.propertie.general_idea: Explicitly set the path matching strategy to ANT_PATH_MATCHER to maintain compatibility with older Spring MVC behavior or specific routing requirements.
